summary: W881 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while routing the W874 endpoint/localized provider through W880 and the W879 comparison concrete-leaves stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because the seven W874 provider fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W881 moves the latest W879-based stable ExactAt boundary from one W853 homology-free provider to one W874 endpoint/localized provider, but the W874 provider fields are still not instantiated.

The remaining W874 provider expands to seven fields: WPP boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity/compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, normalized fixed-target data, source triangulation data, and W726 endpoint/localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for one W874 endpoint/localized selected-cochain provider, including its seven expanded fields.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
